childhood.familyBackground: Daughter of Choi Jong-gun, SK Group founder, and No Soon-ae. Younger sibling of Chey Tae-won (SK Group Chairman) and Chey Jae-won (SK Group Vice Chairman). Part of the prominent SK chaebol family.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: SK그룹 창립자 최종현과 노순애의 2남 1녀 중 막내딸. 최태원 SK그룹 회장과 최재원 SK그룹 수석부회장의 동생. SK 재벌 가문의 주요 일원.
childhood.education: Educated in South Korea. Completed secondary education.
childhood.educationKo: 한국에서 교육 받음. 중등 교육 완료.
childhood.earlyLife: Grew up in the prominent SK Group founder family. Maintained low public profile throughout childhood and early adulthood.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: SK그룹 창립자 가문에서 성장. 유년기와 초반 성인기를 통해 낮은 사회적 노출을 유지.
childhood.source: Wikipedia, Namu Wiki, Financial News Korea, Seoul Economic Daily

careerTimeline.event: Married Kim Jun-il, an employee at Sunkyung Information Systems, introduced by her older brother Chey Tae-won
careerTimeline.eventKo: 큰오빠 최태원의 소개로 선경정보시스템의 평사원 김준일과 결혼

careerTimeline.event: Divorced from Kim Jun-il in May
Appointed as 3rd chairwoman of SK Happiness Sharing Foundation
Ranked 4th wealthiest woman in South Korea by Forbes with assets valued at $1.23 billion
careerTimeline.eventKo: 포브스에서 자산 123,000만 달러(약 1조 3,750억원)로 평가되어 대한민국 여성 부호 4위로 랭크

careerTimeline.event: Maintains 6.58% stake in SK Inc., making her the 3rd largest private shareholder after Chey Tae-won and National Pension Service
careerTimeline.eventKo: SK주식회사 지분 6.58%를 보유하여 최태원, 국민연금에 이은 3대 대주주 지위 유지

personalTraits.knownFor: Low public profile and reclusive nature even among prominent Korean chaebol families. Avoids media exposure. Known for philanthropic activities as chairwoman of SK Happiness Sharing Foundation. Active shareholder management of SK Group stakes.
personalTraits.knownForKo: 한국 재벌가 중에서도 유독 저소한 공적 이미지와 은폐된 성향. 언론 노출을 회피함. SK행복나눔재단 이사장으로서의 자선 활동. SK그룹 주식에 대한 적극적 주주 활동.
personalTraits.philanthropy: Chairwoman of SK Happiness Sharing Foundation, leading charitable and social contribution activities
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: SK행복나눔재단 이사장으로서 자선 및 사회 기여 활동 주도
personalTraits.controversies: Involved in controversy regarding SK Happiness Foundation's investment in Daejang-dong development project and Hwacheon Daeyu investment firm. Questioned regarding property rental business through personal company.
personalTraits.controversiesKo: SK행복나눔재단의 대장동 사업 및 화천대유 투자사에 대한 투자 논란. 개인회사를 통한 부동산 임대사업 관련 의혹.
